name: claymorphism
description: 黏土拟态风格 - 软糯厚实体、圆角卡片、糖果色、玩具般 3D 触感
prompt_template: Claymorphism style, soft chunky 3D clay interface, thick toy-like rounded cards, creamy background {background}, candy colors {palette}, inflated pill buttons, bright inner highlights, soft bottom-right shadows, tactile depth, bubbly icons, smooth plastic texture, friendly high-contrast typography, clean single-slide presentation composition, --ar {aspect_ratio} --style raw --v 6
negative_prompt: thin sharp edges, brutalist, wireframe, metallic chrome, photorealistic toys, grunge, dark horror aesthetic, low contrast, realistic humans, cluttered text, tiny details
